D2 Vision L1 Remember Atom

Find Your Blind Spot

place a target where the optic nerve leaves the retina and watch it vanish

The optic disc has no rods or cones, so an object whose image lands there is invisible. In each eye it sits about 15° toward your nose from the centre of gaze.

To try it: close your left eye, stare at the + with your right eye, and slide the dot outward. Near 15° it falls on the optic disc (shaded on the retina map) and disappears.
